query:
-- Look at MC- prefixed products - these look like they could be multi-component bundles
-- Also check the UCXcel Essential varying costs
SELECT 
  productName,
  productType,
  enterpriseName,
  amountExGst,
  serviceRefId
FROM supplier_workbook_line_items swli
JOIN supplier_workbook_uploads swu ON swli.uploadId = swu.id
WHERE swu.supplier = 'SasBoss'
AND (
  productName LIKE 'MC -%' OR
  productName LIKE 'MC-%' OR
  productName = 'UCXcel Essential'
)
ORDER BY productName, amountExGst DESC
LIMIT 20;
